_meta.description: Known MEV bots, sandwich attackers, JIT liquidity bots, and high-frequency arbitrage wallets. These wallets have ZERO copy-trading alpha — their PnL comes from front-running, not market direction. Filter them out at the monitor layer.

policy.on_match: Set OnChainEvent.is_mev_suspect=True. Score 0 confidence. Skip routing.
policy.on_unknown_high_frequency: If wallet does >100 swaps in 24h, flag as 'mev_candidate' and downgrade trust one tier. After 3 such flags within 7 days, auto-retire.

important_notes: This is a STARTER list. The user MUST extend it monthly from the data sources above — new MEV bots appear daily.
Some entries are bot operator wallets (EOA), some are bot smart contracts. Both should be blacklisted because copy-trading either is meaningless.
Solana MEV runs differently (no public mempool) — fewer known operators, but Jito bundle searchers and known JIT bots should be added once identified.
If a wallet you currently track appears in this list, your scoring upstream is broken. Investigate before merging it in.

schema.label: human-readable identifier
schema.category: sandwich | jit_liquidity | arbitrage | searcher | mev_relay | unknown_mev
schema.confidence: high | medium | low (high = publicly verified, medium = strong heuristic, low = suspected only)

eth.label: jaredfromsubway.eth (primary)
eth.source: Public attribution, widely documented in 2023-2024 MEV reports

eth.label: MEV Bot Contract
eth.source: Vanity prefix 0x00.. typical MEV deploy pattern

bsc.label: BSC MEV Bot (high-volume)
bsc.source: BscScan MEV label, vanity prefix pattern

sol.label: Solana JIT Liquidity Bot (Jito searcher)
sol.source: Suspected — verify via Jito bundle data before relying

_known_relays_and_infrastructure_not_bla.description: These are MEV infrastructure (relays, builders, multisigs) that should NOT be copy-traded but are NOT necessarily malicious. They appear in tx flows but are pass-through.
_known_relays_and_infrastructure_not_bla.policy: If a tracked wallet IS one of these, the scoring layer broke. If a tracked wallet INTERACTS WITH these (typical), no action needed — it's just routing.
